title: Principal Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Khan Academy India
jsonLd.description:
Khan Academy India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khan Academy India:
Khan Academy India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
